message:
test: extension registration artifact logging + grep assertion messages

- e2e_extension_registration.rs: add JSONL artifact logging (bd-nh33)
  with log_registration_snapshot() recording extension source and
  registration counts (commands, shortcuts, flags, providers, model
  entries) and write_jsonl_artifacts() persisting test_logs.jsonl +
  artifact_index.jsonl to harness temp dir; additional logging in
  e2e_command_execute_returns_display
- tools_conformance.rs: improve grep assertion messages — add format
  strings to match-limit and per-line truncation assertions so failures
  display the actual grep output for diagnosis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
